chosen_action.title: Resync the latest execution-board truth snapshot after post-hold release

why_this_action.summary: The current bottleneck is still conversion_to_free_use, but no truthful external/manual lane is available inside the active review windows. The highest-leverage move available now was to repair a runtime truth leak: after the short review window cleared at 2026-05-27T18:35:08, the dated execution board and current lane snapshot could refresh while the shared latest board alias stayed stale, which weakens follow-through and risks fake-green empty-board churn.
why_this_action.decision_rule: No truthful do-now packet existed, the hold-window rerun/prompt repairs had already been spent, and improving the board runner's truthfulness directly improves the next executable lane selection.

result.summary: Patched outcome_execution_board_runner.sync_latest_truth_snapshot so truth-snapshot refreshes also rewrite drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md, added regression coverage for that alias-sync path, ran the runner tests, and executed a fresh truth snapshot so the live latest board/status now match the post-hold state.

expected_outcome: Future no-do-now-board refreshes fail closed to the current truth instead of leaving the shared latest board alias stale, making post-hold follow-through more trustworthy and reducing repeated fake-progress churn.

measurement_window.success_metric: The next truth-snapshot or post-execution board refresh updates both the dated board and drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md to the same current content.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If a later run still leaves the latest board alias stale relative to the dated board, escalate from local sync repair to a stronger board-generation/process watchdog.
